famous quote:

-Helen Keller
Interview Text:
Jacob (name changed):

(part 3)

Another time he had a dream that he was the pastor for a funeral in a big affluent city in China. He was speaking in fluent Mandarin. People were in crisply ironed black outfits. He thought it was a funeral for his lady friend's relative. Her hair was white and many years had passed. His friend was wearing the big glasses as she does now. 
 
In the last dream Jacob had, he was seeing himself old, with a gray beard, in an American courtroom with Chinese and American dignitaries listening to him talk. Jacob was speaking to both groups and utilized both languages. He was speaking about peace to the men and women listening.

Recently, he asked God what all this meant about him moving to China and he felt God say, 'Read Daniel because that is how it is going to go.' He read it and realized Daniel was pulled out of a nation just before it was invaded and or judged. Daniel ended up within the ranks of the invading nation years later. Jacob thinks he will probably be taken to China by force or by necessity, perhaps just prior to when this nation collapses. In the same way Daniel, in the book of Daniel, was taken to Babylon prior to Jerusalems destruction.
Music Video Instructions: Imagine if God's love for us, and ours for him was like this.
